title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown examines how logarithmic transformations can be applied to images, using Escher's Print Gallery as a central example. The video explores conformal maps from complex analysis and the complex logarithm to understand the mathematical structure underlying the artwork's infinite recursive pattern.
